# Pomerico Group

> Pomerico Group is a Polish HR outsourcing and BPO company founded in 2015 in Gdańsk, Poland. We provide end-to-end HR outsourcing, BPO, EOR, recruitment and business consulting for international companies operating in Poland and across Europe.

## Company Facts

- Legal name: Pomerico Group Sp. z o.o.
- Founded: 2015
- Headquarters: Szafarnia 11/F8, 80-755 Gdańsk, Poland
- Employees: 11-50
- General Manager: Sebastian Kunc
- Website: https://pomerico.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/pomerico/

## Key Metrics

- 2,500+ completed processes
- 92% project success rate
- 0-7% employee turnover in outsourced teams
- 85% long-term client retention
- 93% candidate satisfaction rating
- First candidates within 48 hours
- Full teams onboarded in 2-4 weeks

## Services

- BPO – Business Process Outsourcing: full takeover of HR, finance, IT, admin processes with dedicated teams and KPI delivery
- PEO – Professional Employer Organization: co-employment model, client retains operational control, Pomerico handles HR admin and compliance
- EOR – Employer of Record: Pomerico is sole legal employer, hire in Poland/EU without local entity setup
- Finance Outsourcing & Contracting: accounting, controlling, payroll, operational finance with SAP/SQL/Python expertise
- Body Leasing / Staff Augmentation: flexible specialist deployment in IT, HR, Finance, Marketing
- HR Outsourcing & Consulting: HR audits, competency matrices, interim HR leadership, HRBP contracting
- Recruitment Services / RPO: end-to-end recruitment, Direct Search, Executive Search, employer branding
- IT Contracting: developers, DevOps, data engineers, cloud engineers on flexible terms
- Market Entry in Poland: legal, tax, HR, accounting and compliance support for companies entering the Polish market
- Business Consulting / Tax & Law: Polish tax regulations, legal compliance, international expansion advisory
- Nearshoring in Poland: dedicated teams operating in client's time zone at competitive rates
- EOR On-Site: Employer of Record with dedicated onsite management and remote team coordination

## Industries

- Information Technology: Big Data, AI, DevOps, software development teams
- Manufacturing & Industry: production managers, quality engineers, warehouse automation teams
- Banking & Insurance: financial professionals, risk analysts, compliance specialists for regulated environments
- Intralogistics & Warehousing: maintenance teams, operations staff, engineering teams for automated facilities
- Shared Services / BPO: staffing and managing shared service centers with finance, HR, customer support teams

## Case Studies

- Hedepy: launched Czech online therapy platform in Poland via EOR without local entity, operational within weeks
- Datumo: 17-phase HR transformation over 12 months — recruitment systems, employer branding, org design, career paths
- SSI Schaefer: built 35-person maintenance team for automated warehousing in 3 months (half planned time)
- Babord VAP: 60 successful hires from 1,600 applications, 40,000 people reached through recruitment campaigns
- Kardex: executive search for Country Sales Manager in intralogistics/warehouse automation
- Joong Won Poland: secured Quality Control Manager within weeks after four agencies had rejected the brief
- Apex Thermo King: multi-stage executive search for Service Network Manager succession
